titleStmt.title: SII 30.165: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 165. (A.R. No. 244 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the west wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the same shrine Rājēndra-Chōḻa II: year 5: 1057 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with the praśasti of the king. It records the sale of land to the temple of Bhavarudra Sōmīsvaradēva on the southern bank of the river Vēhkā [Vēgavati] by the assembly of Parākramasōḻach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Dāmar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Dāmark-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam, for 10 kāsu from the temple authorities. The land was also declared as taxfree. It also confers the privilege of irrigating the land and prohibited others from drawing water. Four hundred kuḻi of house-site was also given to the tillers for their residence.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ maruvi
ya ceṅkol ventaṉ muṉ
pona ceṉai piṉṉatuvāka
muṉṉen=ti cenṟu Iraṭṭapāṭi
Eḻaraiilakkamuṅ koṇṭu kollāpurattu jayastambham nāṭṭi Etiramar
peṟātu Eṇṭicaivayiṟ paṟaiyatu kaṟaṅka perāṟṟaṅkaraik koppattu Āhava
mallaṉai Aṭaṟceṉaiyellām pāratu
nikaḻap pacumpiṇamākki Āṅkatu kaṇ
ṭu niṉṟa Āhavamallaṉ puṟakkiṭṭoṭa Avaṉā
ṉaiyuṅ kutiraiyu moṭṭaka niraikaḷum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum vibhāvamuma
ṭaṅkaluṅ kaikkoṇṭu vijayābhiṣekam paṇṇi virasimhāsaṉattu viṟṟirunta
ruḷiya kopparakecarivarmmarāṉa
Uṭaiyār śrīrājentratevarkku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu jayaṅ
koṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu tāmarkkoṭṭattu tāmarnāṭṭu parākkirama co
ḻac caturvvetimaṅkalattu perumaṇṭapatte mahaāsabhaip peruṅkuṟi
pe(ya)rumakkaḷoṅ kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kuṭiyiruntu tiruveḵkāviṉ ten
karaiyil bhavaruttira comicuratevarkku tevatāṉamāka namma tarmma
yuḷpālum piṭākai kollainilam veṇṭuna tūreri
nirnirkkum Eṅkaṇilattukku meṟkkun tenpāṟkel
lai tirucciṟṟampalacceriyil kiḻakkaṭaiya payireṟṟina nilattu
kku vaṭakku melpāṟ kollainilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkel
lai Ivvūr kollainilattuk
ku teṟkumāka Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷḷum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilattuk kal
luṅ kaḷaru nikki Ivvūr maṇṭapattu kalveṭṭinapaṭikki kolāl pa
tināyiraṅ kuḻiyinālu Ātidāsaśaṇṭeśvarar pakkal pattukkācu
koṇṭu Ippatināyiraṅ kuḻiyum Ācantira kālam Iṟaiyili
yāka Ittevarkku viṟṟukkuṭuttom Innilattukku nīrpāyvā
y vākkāl Aḻicciyāṟṟile kallaṇai kaḻi nīrkkiyntavāṟu vā
ykkālil nīrppāccik koḷḷap peṟuvatākavum Ivvāykkā
lil nīr maṟṟaiyār viṭṭup pāccappeṟātārākavum kecamaṅkalattu
ṅkutta nallūre meṟppoṉa vaḻikkuk kiḻakku keca
maṅkalattu kuṭikaḷirunta viṭṭukkuk kiḻe kaḻattile
kkumākak kalli kiḻakku nokkip poka Innilattukku nīrpāya
vāykkāl kalli nīr pāycci koḷvārkaḷākavum Inīr maṟṟaiyar tiṇṭip pā
ccappaṭap peṟātārkaḷākavum Ippūmi Uḻuṅkuṭikaḷukkuk kuṭi
yiramum Ippūmiyin melaikkollaiyile nānūṟu kuḻi
kuṭiyirukkaiyāka koṇṭu kuṭiyiruttik ko
ḷḷap peṟuvatākavum Ippūmi Uḻuṅkuṭikaḷaiye Amañciyum
mpilum veṭṭikkoḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷākavum Ikkācu pattum parā
kkirama coḻacceri pākkattu muttamaṇi civatevak kiramavittaṉum co
trairājyakaṭikai madhyasthaṉ tirivikkiramaṉ civacaraṇamāna parākkirama �
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivvūr tirivikkiramapaṭṭanen Ippaṭi Aṟive
kecavapaṭṭanen Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivvūr
Digital edition of SII 30.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
